error_signature: only access first item of the merge node
title: Unable to access all items from merge node output
symptom: When trying to access items from the output of a merge node, only the first item is accessible in expressions.
applies_when: Trying to access multiple items in expressions
not_this_if: Only one item is being merged
Accessing items from a single node output
root_cause: The default merge operation in n8n may not combine items in a way that allows access to all merged outputs. By default, it may only provide access to the first item unless configured otherwise.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the merge node
Change the Merge Operation to 'Combine >> by Position'
Test the expression again to access all items
agent_instruction: Change the merge operation to 'Combine >> by Position' in the merge node settings.
